---
title: "Toda argentino sincero sabra de que estamos hablando"
author: "Iván Weigandi"
date: "2026-11-01"
draft: true
categories: [Argentina, exchange rates]
image: "image.jpg"


---

Bla bla bla
```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

x = np.arange(10)
y = x**2

plt.plot(x, y)
plt.show()
```
